name: Missing You
original_name: คิดถึงเดอะซีรี่ส์
overview: Saengnuea waits for someone he’s never met—but feels deeply connected to. When he meets Kawin, a stranger who stirs forgotten memories, their bond hints at a love that may transcend lifetimes.

trailers.title: Trailer...Missing YOU The series (คิดถึงเดอะซีรี่ส์) Sub.Eng
